tasks.instruction: Read the text below. Fill in each gap (1.1-1.6) with one word to make the text correct.
tasks.text: Last summer, my family 1.1. _________ to a small village in the mountains. We 1.2. _________ in a wooden house near a lake. Every morning I 1.3. _________ up early and went swimming with my older brother. The water was cold, but 1.4. _________ loved it! One day we found a hidden path behind 1.5. _________ house. It led to a beautiful waterfall. That was the 1.6. _________ day of the whole holiday.
